executives.name: Marc Benioff
executives.background: Marc Benioff is Chair, Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder of Salesforce. He founded the company in 1999 and has served as Chairman since its inception. He has served as Chief Executive Officer since 2001.

tenure_dates.title: Co-Founder, Chair of the Board, and CEO

executives.name: Amy Weaver
executives.background: Amy Weaver is President and Chief Financial Officer of Salesforce. She previously served as the company's President and Chief Legal Officer from 2020 to 2021 and as President, Legal and Corporate Affairs from 2017 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Financial Officer, Chief Legal Officer

executives.name: Brian Millham
executives.background: Brian Millham is President and Chief Operating Officer of Salesforce. He has been with the company since 1999 and has held various leadership roles in sales and operations.

executives.name: Ariel Kelman
executives.background: Ariel Kelman is President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce. He joined Salesforce in 2023 from Oracle, where he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer.

executives.name: Sabastian Niles
executives.background: Sabastian Niles is President and Chief Legal Officer of Salesforce. He joined the company in 2023 from Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz, where he was a partner.

executives.name: Adam Blitzer
executives.background: Adam Blitzer has served as our Chief Operating Officer since 2021. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Blitzer held various executive roles at Salesforce, including Executive Vice President and General Manager of Digital (Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, and Experience Cloud). He was the co-founder of Pardot, which was acquired by Salesforce. Mr. Blitzer holds a B.A. from Duke University.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager

executives.name: Adam Selipsky
executives.background: Adam N. Selipsky was CEO of Amazon Web Services from May 2021 to June 2024. He previously served as President and CEO of Tableau Software.

executives.name: Arnold Donald
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Carnival Corporation & plc. He joined the board in 2023.

executives.name: Craig Conway
executives.background: Former President and CEO of PeopleSoft, Inc. He has served as a Director since 2005.

executives.name: John Roos
executives.background: Former U.S. Ambassador to Japan. He has served as a Director since 2013.

executives.name: Laura Alber
executives.background: CEO of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2021.

executives.name: Lynn Vojvodich Radakovich
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

executives.name: Mason Morfit
executives.background: CEO and Co-Chief Investment Officer of ValueAct Capital. He joined the board in 2023.

executives.name: Maynard Webb
executives.background: Founder of Webb Investment Network and former COO of eBay Inc. He has served as a Director since 2006.

executives.name: Neelie Kroes
executives.background: Former Vice President of the European Commission. She has served as a Director since 2016.

executives.name: Oscar Munoz
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman and CEO of United Airlines Holdings, Inc. He joined the board in 2023.

executives.name: Parker Harris
executives.background: Co-founder of Salesforce and Slack CTO. He has served as a Director since 2018.

executives.name: Robin Washington
executives.background: Former EVP and CFO of Gilead Sciences, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2013.

executives.name: Stratton Sclavos
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of VeriSign, Inc. He is a seasoned executive with experience in cybersecurity and technology infrastructure.

executives.name: Susan Wojcicki
executives.background: Former CEO of YouTube. She has served as a Director since 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
